Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current R1 Concepts product catalog, promotions, and featured brake parts to inform email content.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email features accurate, up-to-date product details and pricing, eliminating manual content research that would take 30+ minutes daily.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a complete daily marketing email with subject line, body copy, and CTAs tailored to R1 Concepts branding and current product focus.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Produces professional-quality marketing copy in seconds, replacing the need for a dedicated copywriter and enabling consistent daily email cadence.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Creates and sends the generated marketing email to targeted contact lists via HubSpot Marketing Email API.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Automates the full send workflow including list targeting and delivery, ensuring daily emails reach the right audience segments without manual intervention.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes Dynamic Friction Company product catalog, current deals, and featured product lines for email content sourcing.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Keeps email campaigns aligned with the latest DFC inventory and promotions, removing the daily manual effort of gathering product details.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a branded daily marketing email with compelling subject line, body content, and calls-to-action specific to DFC's audience.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Delivers consistent, high-quality email copy daily without creative bottlenecks, enabling DFC to maintain a strong email presence with zero manual writing.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Publishes and sends the AI-generated email to DFC contact lists through HubSpot Marketing Email API.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Fully automates campaign creation and distribution, ensuring timely daily delivery to segmented DFC audiences without manual HubSpot configuration.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls incoming support tickets from HubSpot including customer details, issue description, order history, and ticket metadata.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Centralizes ticket intake automatically, giving the AI full context on each customer issue without support agents needing to manually review and summarize.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each ticket by issue type and urgency, then drafts a contextual reply using product knowledge and customer history.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Reduces average ticket response time dramatically by auto-classifying and pre-drafting replies, allowing support agents to review and send rather than write from scratch.

R1 Support Agent.action: Updates the ticket with the AI-generated classification, tags, and draft response for the support team to review and send.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Keeps all ticket data and AI-generated responses within HubSpot, maintaining a single source of truth and streamlining the support team's review-and-send workflow.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form submissions captured in HubSpot, including customer details and issue descriptions.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Automates the extraction of customer issue data that would otherwise require manual export, ensuring no return or complaint submission is missed.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs extracted issue and return data into a structured Google Sheet for team analysis, trend tracking, and reporting.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Provides a live, shared analysis workspace where teams can identify recurring product issues, track return trends, and make data-driven inventory or quality decisions.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot for DFC customer activity signals such as website visits, page views, and engagement events on the R1 website.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Captures real-time buying intent signals from existing DFC customers, enabling the sales team to act on warm leads before interest fades.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Sends real-time alert notifications to the DFC sales team via Microsoft Teams messages and email with customer activity details.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Ensures sales reps are immediately notified of high-value customer activity, enabling timely outreach that increases conversion rates and strengthens customer relationships.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Serves as a customer-facing AI chat agent on the R1 Concepts website, fielding product questions, order inquiries, and support requests in real time.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Will provide instant 24/7 customer support, reducing wait times and improving the shopping experience while deflecting routine inquiries from the human support team.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Processes customer questions using AI to generate accurate, branded responses drawing from R1 product data, FAQs, and order systems.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Enables intelligent, context-aware conversations that resolve customer issues autonomously, reducing support ticket volume and improving customer satisfaction scores.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Processes keyword inputs and generates optimized search queries and criteria for discovering relevant content creators across multiple platforms.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Leverages AI to intelligently expand and refine keyword strategies, uncovering creators that manual searches would miss and dramatically accelerating the discovery process.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches YouTube for content creators matching keyword criteria, pulling channel metrics, content themes, and audience data.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Identifies high-potential YouTube creators with relevant audiences, providing quantitative data to evaluate partnership fit before any outreach begins.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Discovers and extracts Instagram creator profiles matching target keywords, including follower metrics and content engagement data.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Expands the creator pipeline to Instagram's visual-first platform, capturing influencers who may not be discoverable through traditional search engines.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Performs broad web searches to discover creators on blogs, TikTok, and other platforms not covered by dedicated APIs.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Casts the widest possible net for creator discovery, ensuring no relevant influencer is overlooked regardless of their primary platform.

Creator Qualifier.action: Evaluates discovered creators against customizable scoring weights including audience size, engagement quality, content relevance, and brand alignment.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Replaces hours of manual creator vetting with instant AI-powered scoring, ensuring only the highest-potential creators advance to outreach and preventing wasted partnership efforts.

Creator Qualifier.action: Generates a prioritized shortlist of qualified creators with scoring breakdowns and recommended outreach priority based on configurable weight thresholds.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Gives the marketing team a data-driven, rank-ordered creator list ready for outreach, eliminating subjective decision-making and focusing resources on the best-fit partnerships.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves learned outreach sequences, email templates, and prompt configurations from Google Drive to inform personalized outreach messaging.
Creator Outreach.impact: Ensures outreach emails are based on proven sequences and brand guidelines stored centrally, maintaining consistency and leveraging historical performance data.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach emails for each qualified creator using learned sequences, creator profile data, and brand-specific prompts.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces tailored, high-converting outreach at scale, enabling the team to contact dozens of creators daily with personalized messaging that would take hours to write manually.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated personalized outreach emails to qualified creators and logs send status for sequence tracking.
Creator Outreach.impact: Automates the full email send and tracking workflow, ensuring timely outreach delivery and enabling automated follow-up sequences without manual intervention.

Creator Reponse.action: Monitors inbox for creator replies and retrieves full email threads including previous outreach context and conversation history.
Creator Reponse.impact: Automatically captures and organizes creator responses, ensuring no reply is missed and providing the AI with full conversation context for intelligent follow-ups.

Creator Reponse.action: Retrieves learned negotiation patterns, past influencer email conversations, and response strategies from Google Drive to inform reply generation.
Creator Reponse.impact: Grounds AI responses in proven negotiation tactics and real historical conversations, ensuring replies are strategically sound and consistent with past successful deals.

Creator Reponse.action: Analyzes the creator's response and generates a contextual reply using learned negotiation techniques and previous influencer conversation patterns.
Creator Reponse.impact: Handles creator negotiations and conversations autonomously with human-level nuance, dramatically reducing the time the marketing team spends on back-and-forth email exchanges.

Creator Reponse.action: Sends the AI-generated reply to the creator within the existing email thread and logs the interaction for ongoing conversation tracking.
Creator Reponse.impact: Maintains seamless, timely communication with creators, keeping negotiations moving forward without delays caused by manual review bottlenecks.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates persuasive email copy for new product launch announcements and monthly recap emails using product details and brand guidelines.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Extracts lifecycle reporting metrics including lead counts, conversion rates, and email engagement data for the reporting period.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Produces a single enriched report that immediately shows which orders can be fulfilled, which are pending, and which are dead ends — eliminating guesswork.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for each backorder status, tailored by whether parts are incoming, delayed, or unavailable.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Customers receive proactive, accurate status updates without reps having to manually draft individual emails, dramatically improving response time and consistency.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes online catalogs from Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to compile a comprehensive make/model/year reference sheet for two-piece rotors.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Automates the tedious process of manually browsing three separate competitor catalogs, capturing complete product data in minutes instead of days.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor data against DFC's existing two-piece rotor inventory to identify overlaps and market gaps.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Reveals exactly where DFC has competitive coverage and where untapped opportunities exist, informing product development and sourcing decisions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated customer outreach emails to gather demand data and purchase interest for identified two-piece rotor applications.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Collects real market demand signals directly from customers, validating which gaps are worth filling before committing to inventory investments.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Consolidates all scraped data, cross-reference results, and customer demand responses into one formatted output sheet for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Dino receives a single, comprehensive reference document combining competitor intelligence, DFC coverage, and customer demand — ready for strategic decisions.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active ad campaigns across Meta and TikTok, extracting every piece of ad copy including headlines, descriptions, and call-to-action fields.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides complete visibility across all live ad copy in one sweep, eliminating the need to manually click through dozens of campaigns and ad sets.

Meta Investigation.action: Searches all extracted ad copy for the specified phrases and compiles a flagged list showing the exact campaign, ad, field, and copy where each match was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Pinpoints compliance or branding issues across hundreds of ads in seconds, catching problematic phrases that manual review would likely miss.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails the complete flagged list to the requester with each match organized by platform, campaign, and specific ad field.
Meta Investigation.impact: The team receives an actionable report they can immediately use to update or pause non-compliant ads, reducing legal and brand risk exposure.
